content: i think people are underestimating this modification by a lot
i've been playing her for, mmh, 10 months now
and i'm pretty happy with the change
overall, it's gonna be a buff
The niche to shut down wheels is powerful, this is just action lock but slightly better if it means any card you play.
dont forget she does 2x more entwines now too
it also makes her exalt goes from 8x4 (32 dmg), to a potential of 32 + 40 (2x5x4)
in Most game, i dont have a wheel to shutdown specificly, it's more situationnal
so in all those games, this is just a buff
the single target for 1 cost hurt too now, basicly 7+10 dmg
And if i put 4 entwine on someone with a noblestaff or something, it may still be a lock, he wont necessary have 4 cards to play with this character in 1 turn
and it would still deal 20 dmg, which may kill him if too low hp
it removes a layer per card use
So Precious Collection is silly now if you don't wipe your opponents team in one turn.
I did read it first lol. Where are you getting that I didn't?
i assumed you didnt cause you didnt mention the part about removing dmg instances from using heals in the paragraph after so heals are actually worse

though thats not really the point, their point was that using heal purely for heal is garbage since its outdone by dmg dealers
so heal is used for strategic value or the other effect on the card if there is one
yes precious collection got unintendedly buffed

originally it was self stun
then they changed it to self entwine (which was a buff-ish where you could self dispel with ogier or do attacks while its not active)
literally anyone can self remove entwine now
not every unit has so many cards to use to remove entwine
yeah and what is skill lock gonna do to those same units
i dont get it what are you implying
we are talking about entwine are we not
what i said is that its a weaker action lock
if it does then it is strong, but considering it says adjustment, the presumption is its replacing the mechanic entirely
oh ogier is nerfed in the card that didnt matter
well itll help with slowing down his first two turns burst potential but
just nerfing the force taunt entirely means they can even buff this to 2 cost
is agrippa wheel suddenly a lot better
if it still locks then yeah
if you use a strike to remove entwine you take 5 dmg then it gets immediately replaced
if not then its precious collection
so essentially agrippa wheel is 5 dmg per card use that hits your unit
it still locks but now youre not as helpless
can helot nuke if you have perma entwine
that naut nerf still hurts as hell
getting that copy card on the only seed was peak cinema
hurts even more to know it deserves it
with enough luck youre already the winner
the biggest change this update is entwine tbh
can ryker rerun already i need his wheel
im just considering duping agrippa 1 cost just to screw with people
is agrippa dmg dealer actually a thing now
it has been for a while
cause while her dmg was ok
castor was just better at it
and she doesnt give as much entwine so opponent dmg dealers usually outpace her
yeah but i played and fought against a few backline feetgrippa before
but now she has like a huge amount of entwine... permanent 5 dmg per card used and permanent wheel locked is actually kinda nuts ngl
they pretty much just want early game control so she disables them late game
gotta think about how i can meme an agrippa dmg comp out of thin air
but yeah easily outpaced if she wasnt helped on scaling
precious collection is probably the best wheel now
the real question is what should i use before then
when i played it with castor i found fouette working for her well
but thats because his cards provide team poke and sustain
for agrippa you might just want more scaling like any growth wheel or glacier
i think agrippa wheel is a lot better as well
might be mainstay on some teams
under right circumstances every time opponent attacks you they take 5 dmg and get their wheel locked
24 might become meta again this patch
helot is untouched so theres still that threat
precious collection meta would be interesting since kali's new wheel is good on pve therefore many might bring it to pvp
we dont put the last standing unit in spot 4 anymore
and then have a taunt backline if possible
then again paralysis didnt get nerf that much so theyll still be around
also why the ryker nerf he isnt even that prominent
What am I suppose to do in traphase now? my comp was already cope, but now it got nerfed further...
do you think this will work kade? I think my ogier snipe comp is dead X_X
Strike comp untouched and paralyze nerfed~
and a new 50% increased strike wheel to snipe backline
snipe comp is not dead lmfao
im ready for the new wheel
is 24 good for the new wheel? seems like faint's wheel would work equally well
since ur aoe doesn't care about the back hit
equivalent of alva's wheel for 2 cost cheaper
alva's is 100% isn't it? all i'm reading from the patch notes is 50% + hit backline
imma still try it even tho at this point caecus wheel would be better kekw

For now i guess lotan + doll + ramona + ogier, you can easily go up to around 1000 elo with this, the wheel are R wheel : Favor + Frenzy on lotan, SR wheel : nobleman staff for either ramona or doll depending on the situation + Critical point for ogier
Lowest unit hp i own and also really good for cleansing enemy buff or your own debuff, really good situational unit, it enable fast treasured rarity card play

Just experiment with what you got since you are fighting bot matches all the way up to 1500 rating now.
Post your roster later after you spend more standard pulls.
its funny watching her cause seeing people revive the team and then using 1 cost is cinema

got to 2k with this team, it's stupid how it just decimate any team comp
well helot is no brain meta

Thinking they can go ooga bonga and one shot everyone for easy win

not bringing a counter to that is weird
Nowadays a lot of people go for analysis of death
They don't go for arithmetica wheel
They don't understand that doresain wheel cost 5 arithmetica
And they need some arithmetica in case they need to consume other cards for charge

cant exactly tell by how much and idk if i still want to run her on a team but it does seem kinda busted
would mean i can ignore enhance and still win in strike cleave

charge is such a broken mechanic
You managed to pull it off?
100% strike dmg bonus hit really hard
Instead of 4 It's basically 8 charge with that wheel
5 charge + lotan + alva wheel = ded one guy
then pandia + lotan again = second ded guy
then castor + posse + lotan = ded third guy
when i tried ur comp i got alva wheel at bottom of deck
That wheel is just that broken
I reccomend just asking for friendly duels here if you want to test out comps.
how much is it normally and how much is each charge
Alva 3 cost strike card does 15 dmg
10 charge is +75 dmg which is legit
So alva wheel make that 3 cost card a natural 30 dmg
Now you see the big dmg?
And with 3 amp from pandia exalt it's 117
reasom why its not 5 charge = 10 without
is cause the 2x dmg also multiplies base
and is essentially 2 charge in itself
Her wheel is just that broken
You can also argue for lotan wheel too
Lotan can spam 4 exalt in 1 turn
so a +50% is essentially one free charge too
or you can run frenzy like noobs and do 4 exalt and half the dmg
But it need a bit more setup
any team that can return fire with 2 units left will dumpster it
all the new wheel mechanics being broken as f makes me want to make and play an agrippa based comp
agrippa main dmg seems stupid now
I did that lotan strat to <@1288446421573304364> ,he didn't understood what was going on xD

But it was also a huge nerf for her because entwine can't be there for all the turn
if you stack 4 entwine on enemy they literally have to play 4 cards on that unit to remove it while taking 20 dmg
they cant do shit if they are perma entwine and take 5 dmg per card
Feels like doll cleanse on someone who have nobleman staff then exalt would works wonders
how often you see a self cleanse thats not noble
Intentionally play cards to dmg yourself so you recharge alienus
But she is not that famous

the moment they strike you they take 5 dmg, one entwine gone, and then its immdiately reapplied
